benchmark_metadata.title: ATAC-seq chromatin accessibility workflow retrieval and execution
benchmark_metadata.benchmark_goal: Measure whether an agent can discover, select, and execute an appropriate Galaxy ATAC-seq workflow for the same real-world task when the user prompt is low-context, medium-context, or high-context, while reserving exact named-workflow adherence for the high-context tier.

canonical_task_interpretation.expected_execution_scope: all execution steps after planning occur in Galaxy only

hidden_dataset_profile.input_format_expectation: collection or a list of datasets

scientific_solution_score.description: Scores whether the run produced a scientifically useful solution for the biomedical problem using the base scientific criteria for the task.
scientific_solution_score.evidence_policy: Only explicit or artifact-backed scientific evidence counts; do not assume unreported metric provenance or answer fields.

standard_analysis_score.description: Scores adherence to the requested or benchmark-standard analysis path using only explicit standard-path constraints.
standard_analysis_score.evidence_policy: Score only explicit prompt constraints encoded in tier_specific_expectations; do not penalize valid alternative methods when no standard path is stated.

galaxy_execution_score.description: Scores competence in manipulating and accessing the Galaxy environment, including upload/fetch, history use, execution control, monitoring, recovery, and provenance.
galaxy_execution_score.scope_rule: Do not award or deduct this score for analytical correctness alone unless the task explicitly makes Galaxy behavior part of the requirement.
galaxy_execution_score.evidence_policy: Credit only Galaxy-backed execution evidence and auditable run-trace evidence; missing trace support should reduce this score.

low_context: Infer that the task is paired-end ATAC-seq chromatin accessibility analysis.
Find and justify a suitable Galaxy workflow path.
Report the analysis goal, required input structure, final artifact type, and workflow size from the executed workflow.
medium_context: Use validated Galaxy resources if available.
Choose a suitable Galaxy ATAC-seq workflow and execute it correctly.
Report the correct analysis goal, input format, final artifact type, and workflow size from the executed workflow.
high_context: Retrieve the intended IWC-validated ATAC-seq workflow.
Execute the named workflow on the provided paired-end data.
Report the correct analysis goal, input format, final artifact type, and workflow size from the executed workflow.

deterministic_checks.description: Execution after planning occurred only in Galaxy.
The run record shows IWC or equivalent Galaxy-native workflow resources were checked.
The reported analysis goal matches chromatin accessibility profiling under alias normalization.
The reported workflow input format matches the expected paired-collection semantics under alias normalization.
The reported final artifact is a valid coverage-track output consistent with the executed workflow; in the high-context tier it should match the named workflow's bigwig output.
The final result contains the workflow name used for the reported run.
The reported number of workflow tool steps matches the executed workflow under artifact-based provenance checks rather than a hidden canonical size.
The result contains an adaptation summary consistent with the run trace.
For the high-context variant, the named IWC workflow was used unless a documented blocking reason forced a justified deviation.

dimensions.name: context_extraction
dimensions.description: How well the agent identified the task structure, constraints, and answer-bearing outputs from the prompt and inputs.

dimensions.name: planning_quality
dimensions.description: How well the agent used Galaxy-native resources and formed a justified execution plan.

dimensions.name: execution_quality
dimensions.description: How correctly and robustly the analysis was executed inside Galaxy.

dimensions.name: result_extraction_and_reporting
dimensions.description: How accurately the final result fields and audit trail were extracted and reported.

benchmark_gaps_covered: correct workflow execution under partial specification
